moments.title: Wimbledon continues
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships are in full swing, with Day 4 of the prestigious tennis tournament taking place today, featuring top players on the grass courts.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Day 4 at Wimbledon! Who are you backing to make it through to the weekend? Every serve, every volley, every roar from the crowd – it's all happening right now.

angles.name: Best of British
angles.copy: Sun's out (hopefully!) and the strawberries and cream are flowing. It's Day 4 of Wimbledon. Are any British hopefuls catching your eye today?

moments.title: Michelle Branch turns 43
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and guitarist Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere' and 'The Game of Love', celebrates her 43rd birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Michelle
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday to Michelle Branch today! Remember 'Everywhere'? Still sounds as fresh as it did in the noughties. What's your favourite Michelle Branch track?

angles.name: 00s Throwback
angles.copy: It's Michelle Branch's 43rd birthday! From 'Everywhere' to 'Are You Happy Now?', she gave us some serious 00s pop-rock anthems. Still got them on your playlist?

moments.title: Love Island drama continues
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK is well underway, bringing daily drama, romance, and villa antics to screens across the country.

angles.name: Villa Latest
angles.copy: Who's coupling up and who's getting dumped? The Love Island villa is delivering daily drama. What was last night's biggest moment for you?

angles.name: Hot Takes
angles.copy: Catching up on Love Island? The heat is definitely on in the villa! Who's your favourite islander so far and why?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart imminent
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is set to be updated tomorrow, Friday, July 3rd, revealing the nation's new number one and top-selling tracks.

angles.name: Chart Prediction
angles.copy: Tomorrow, a new UK Singles Chart drops! Who do you think will be crowned number one? Any new entries you're hoping to see climb the ranks?

angles.name: Who's Hot?
angles.copy: The battle for the top spot is always fierce. The new UK Singles Chart update is just hours away. Which artist deserves to be at #1?

moments.title: Tour de France kicks off
moments.blurb: The 2026 Tour de France, cycling's most prestigious race, begins this Saturday, July 4th, starting in Barcelona, Spain.

angles.name: Grand Départ
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of epic cycling! The Tour de France kicks off this Saturday. Who's your pick for the Yellow Jersey this year?

angles.name: Cycling Fever
angles.copy: The greatest show on two wheels starts Saturday! Tour de France is almost here. Will you be tuning in to watch the peloton tackle the mountains?

moments.title: Post Malone turns 31
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated artist Post Malone, known for his genre-bending hits, celebrates his 31st birthday on Saturday, July 4th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Posty
angles.copy: This Saturday, Post Malone turns 31! From 'Rockstar' to his latest country ventures, he keeps us guessing. What's your favourite Posty track?

angles.name: Celebrating Post Malone
angles.copy: Ahead of his 31st birthday on Saturday, we're celebrating Post Malone! Which of his massive tunes always gets you singing along?

moments.title: Wireless Festival weekend
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival, one of the UK's biggest urban music festivals, takes over Finsbury Park in London from July 5th to 7th, featuring a lineup of top hip-hop, rap, and R&B artists.

angles.name: Wireless is HERE
angles.copy: Finsbury Park is about to go OFF! Wireless Festival kicks off this weekend (July 5-7). Who are you hyped to see on the lineup?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is just around the corner! London is getting ready for a massive weekend of urban music. What's your must-see act?

moments.title: Huey Lewis turns 76
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and actor Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday on Saturday, July 5th.

angles.name: It's Hip to Be Square
angles.copy: Power of Love! Huey Lewis turns 76 this Saturday. What's your favourite hit from Huey Lewis and the News?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis on Saturday! From 'The Power of Love' to 'Heart of Rock & Roll', his music defined an era. What's your go-to track?

moments.title: RZA turns 57
moments.blurb: RZA, the influential rapper, producer, and de facto leader of the Wu-Tang Clan, celebrates his 57th birthday on Saturday, July 5th.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday this Saturday to the one and only RZA! The mastermind behind the Wu-Tang Clan's iconic sound. What's your favourite Wu-Tang album?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Architect
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of a true hip-hop architect, RZA, this Saturday! His production changed the game. What's your top RZA-produced track?

moments.title: Mýa turns 47
moments.blurb: American R&B singer Mýa, known for hits like 'Case of the Ex' and 'Ghetto Supastar', celebrates her 47th birthday on Sunday, July 6th.

angles.name: Birthday Queen Mýa
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 47th Birthday to the incredible Mýa this Sunday! Which of her smooth R&B anthems is still on heavy rotation for you?

angles.name: 90s/00s R&B Vibe
angles.copy: Mýa turns 47 on Sunday! From 'It's All About Me' to 'Case of the Ex', she gave us so many bops. What's your favourite Mýa track?

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on Monday, July 7th.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on Monday! An absolute icon. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo?

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Monday is Ringo Starr's 86th birthday! From The Beatles to his All-Starr Band, his rhythm is unmistakable. Which Ringo-led song do you love most?

moments.title: Beck turns 56
moments.blurb: Genre-bending American musician Beck, known for hits like 'Loser' and 'Where It's At', celebrates his 56th birthday on Tuesday, July 8th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Beck
angles.copy: Tuesday is Beck's 56th birthday! The master of musical reinvention, from 'Loser' to 'Dreams'. What's your favourite era of Beck?

angles.name: Alt-Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Beck's 56th birthday on Tuesday! His unique sound defined alternative music for decades. Which of his albums is your all-time favourite?

moments.title: Courtney Love turns 62
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, iconic frontwoman of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on Wednesday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a fierce Happy 62nd Birthday to the one and only Courtney Love this Wednesday! What's your favourite Hole anthem or solo track?

angles.name: 90s Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Wednesday, Courtney Love turns 62! A true force in 90s alternative rock. Which of her powerful songs resonates most with you?

moments.title: Jack White turns 51
moments.blurb: American musician Jack White, known for his work with The White Stripes, The Raconteurs, and his solo career, celebrates his 51st birthday on Wednesday, July 9th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Jack
angles.copy: Wednesday is Jack White's 51st birthday! From White Stripes riffs to solo masterpieces, his guitar work is iconic. What's your favourite Jack White project?

angles.name: Modern Rock Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the 51st birthday of a modern rock legend, Jack White, this Wednesday! What's the song that first got you hooked on his unique sound?

moments.title: Jessica Simpson turns 46
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and fashion designer Jessica Simpson, known for her 00s pop career, celebrates her 46th birthday on Thursday, July 10th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Jessica
angles.copy: Thursday, Jessica Simpson turns 46! From 'I Wanna Love You Forever' to 'A Public Affair', she was a huge 00s pop star. What's your favourite of her songs?

angles.name: 00s Pop Princess
angles.copy: Celebrating Jessica Simpson's 46th birthday this Thursday! Remember her reality TV show and those undeniable pop hits? Which one is your throwback favourite?

moments.title: Mavis Staples turns 87
moments.blurb: Legendary American gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, known for her work with The Staple Singers and her solo career, celebrates her 87th birthday on Thursday, July 10th.

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a magnificent Happy 87th Birthday to the living legend Mavis Staples this Thursday! Her voice is pure soul. What's your favourite Staple Singers classic?

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: On Thursday, Mavis Staples turns 87! A true icon whose music has inspired generations. Celebrate by sharing your favourite Mavis Staples song.

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix weekend
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix roars into Silverstone this weekend, July 10-12, bringing high-speed action and drama to UK motorsport fans.

angles.name: Silverstone Showdown
angles.copy: Start your engines! The British Grand Prix is at Silverstone this weekend (July 10-12). Who are you backing for pole position and the win?

angles.name: F1 Fever
angles.copy: The biggest race on the British calendar is almost here! F1 British Grand Prix weekend starts Friday. Are you heading to Silverstone or watching from home?

moments.title: Richie Sambora turns 67
moments.blurb: Richie Sambora, the legendary guitarist and co-songwriter for Bon Jovi, celebrates his 67th birthday on Friday, July 11th.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Friday is Richie Sambora's 67th birthday! The iconic Bon Jovi guitarist gave us some of rock's greatest riffs. What's your favourite Richie solo?

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Richie Sambora this Friday! Co-writer of so many classic Bon Jovi anthems. Which one gets you reaching for the air guitar?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival weekend
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green hosts Scotland's biggest music festival, TRNSMT, from July 11th to 13th, featuring a packed lineup across multiple stages.

angles.name: TRNSMT Takes Over
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready?! TRNSMT Festival kicks off this weekend (July 11-13) at Glasgow Green. Who are you buzzing to see live?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just days until TRNSMT Festival takes over Glasgow Green! Get ready for a massive weekend of music. Who's on your must-see list for TRNSMT?
